top_signals.title: Mistral to explore designing own chips, CEO says, as it ramps up infrastructure build
top_signals.summary: Mistral's semiconductor ambitions underscore the French startup's bid to control more of its infrastructure as it competes with OpenAI and Anthropic.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: FBI warns extortion hackers are visiting US law firms to steal data
top_signals.summary: In a public advisory issued Tuesday the FBI said a hacking group has targeted law firms using social engineering schemes to gain remote access to corporate systems and exfiltrate data.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin miner-to-AI boom sends stocks soaring as Cipher and Hut 8 hit fresh highs
top_signals.summary: IREN climbed within 10% of a fresh all-time high after unveiling another major AI infrastructure expansion tied to Dell.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Chinese lodging owners struggle in Japan's Osaka as regulations tighten
Humanoids Summit gives Tokyo a peek of a robotic future
top_signals.summary: A major talking point at the two-day event is how crucial artificial intelligence-powered robots might be for tackling Japan's labor shortage.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Tesco deal helps Esquires Coffee owner to surge in sales as it eyes 300 stores
top_signals.summary: A fresh deal with Tesco helped the owner of the Esquires Coffee chain to a jump in turnover. Cooks Coffee Company, which is listed on Aquis, posted UK and Ireland store sales of £43.1m for the year to end March, a surge of 22.8 per cent. Pre-tax earnings rose 6.8 per cent to £529,000, while [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Realistic AI-created content to require labels during Japan’s election campaigns
top_signals.summary: The requirement will apply to videos and images that may be mistaken for those not generated by AI, while those that can be clearly identified as made using AI will be excluded.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
